meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills for Faster Project Delivery
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Learn how to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to automate your dev workflow and ship high-quality apps faster.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck in freelance projects isn't talent; it’s execution fatigue. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into an autonomous engineering partner. This setup automates boilerplate, refactors legacy code in seconds, and enforces strict architectural standards, allowing you to ship production-ready features while maintaining your sanity.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your caffeine is cold, and the client's deadline is a ticking time bomb. You’re stuck in a loop of refactoring the same UI components while your momentum bleeds out. We’ve all been there—staring at a half-finished repo, feeling the weight of 'unfinished project' syndrome dragging down your reputation and your revenue.

But the era of manual, line-by-line coding is ending. By treating your development environment as an intelligent, context-aware engine, you reclaim your agency. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about architecting a workflow where your tools handle the heavy lifting, leaving you to focus on high-value business logic and client satisfaction.

steps.title: Environment Contextualization
steps.description: Before execution, Claude needs to understand your project's DNA. We prime the workspace to ensure the AI respects your existing architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing directory structure and identify the primary tech stack, dependency versions, and coding conventions currently in use.

steps.title: Boilerplate Automation
steps.description: Never write a scaffold from scratch again. Use Antigravity to define your standard patterns and Claude to instantiate them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized API route scaffold with error handling, logging, and Zod validation based on our established project patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate API scaffold using existing pattern'

steps.title: Automated Refactoring
steps.description: Turn messy, working code into clean, maintainable production code using targeted AI intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify performance bottlenecks in the current service layer and refactor for O(1) complexity where possible while preserving current functionality.

steps.title: Dependency Injection & Cleanup
steps.description: Systematically remove technical debt by letting Claude handle the heavy lifting of dependency updates and module decoupling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit all imports for circular dependencies and suggest a decoupled architecture using the current project structure.

steps.title: Documentation Sync
steps.description: Ensure your project remains professional and hand-off ready with automated documentation generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a README.md and technical specification document based on the current implementation details and business logic.

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts, saving tokens and focus.
Chain your prompts: Ask Antigravity for the plan first, then use Claude Code to execute the specific file modifications.
Use 'Claude Code' in 'chat' mode for architectural brainstorming before committing to any code changes.
Set your system prompt in Claude Code to act as a 'Senior Staff Engineer' to force higher-quality code outputs.
Leverage the 'diff' feature in Claude Code to manually approve every change, ensuring you maintain full control over your codebase.
content.next_steps: After completing your first automated sprint, audit the generated code for style consistency and integrate these scripts into your GitHub Actions for continuous automated quality control.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting unfinished projects stall your freelance career. Harness the power of autonomous engineering to reclaim your time and double your output. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
